ddls:
CREATE TABLE "peptides" (
  "peptide_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each peptide */,
  "peptide_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the peptide */,
  "peptide_name" TEXT /* Name of the peptide */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the peptide */,
  "chirality" TEXT /* Chirality of the peptide (L, D, Mix) */,
  "linear_cyclic" TEXT /* Whether the peptide is linear or cyclic */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the peptide (e.g., Synthetic, Chimeric) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the peptide (e.g., Unknown, Therapeutic) */,
  "n_terminal_modification" TEXT /* Modification at the N-terminal of the peptide */,
  "c_terminal_modification" TEXT /* Modification at the C-terminal of the peptide */,
  "chemical_modification" TEXT /* Chemical modifications of the peptide */,
  "cargo" TEXT /* Cargo carried by the peptide (e.g., Nucleic acid, Fluorophore) */,
  "pubmed_id" TEXT /* PubMed ID associated with the peptide */,
  "synthesis_date" TEXT /* Date when the peptide was synthesized */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date when the peptide was last modified */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the peptide */,
  "research_team" INTEGER /* Research team associated with the peptide */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the peptide */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_chirality FOREIGN KEY ("chirality") REFERENCES chirality ("chirality_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_research_team FOREIGN KEY ("research_team") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_cargo FOREIGN KEY ("cargo") REFERENCES cargos ("cargo_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_linear_cyclic FOREIGN KEY ("linear_cyclic") REFERENCES linear_cyclic ("linear_cyclic_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES sources ("source_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_c_terminal_modification FOREIGN KEY ("c_terminal_modification") REFERENCES terminus_modifications ("modification_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_n_terminal_modification FOREIGN KEY ("n_terminal_modification") REFERENCES terminus_modifications ("modification_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_chemical_modification FOREIGN KEY ("chemical_modification") REFERENCES chemical_modifications ("modification_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "chirality" (
  "chirality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chirality type */,
  "chirality_name" TEXT /* Name of the chirality type (e.g., L, D, Mix) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chirality type */,
  "is_common" INTEGER /* Indicates if the chirality type is commonly used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chirality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "linear_cyclic" (
  "linear_cyclic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each linear/cyclic type */,
  "linear_cyclic_name" TEXT /* Name of the linear/cyclic type (e.g., Linear, Cyclic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the linear/cyclic type */,
  "is_common" INTEGER /* Indicates if the linear/cyclic type is commonly used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("linear_cyclic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Synthetic, Chimeric) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "is_common" INTEGER /* Indicates if the source is commonly used */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the source material is from */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Unknown, Therapeutic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_common" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is commonly used */,
  "application_area" TEXT /* Primary application area of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "terminus_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "modification_name" TEXT /* Name of the modification (e.g., Conjugation with 5(6)-Carboxyfluorescein, Free) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the modification */,
  "is_common" INTEGER /* Indicates if the modification is commonly used */,
  "stability" TEXT /* Stability of the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical modification */,
  "modification_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical modification (e.g., NA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chemical modification */,
  "is_common" INTEGER /* Indicates if the modification is commonly used */,
  "stability" TEXT /* Stability of the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cargos" (
  "cargo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cargo */,
  "cargo_name" TEXT /* Name of the cargo (e.g., Nucleic acid, Fluorophore) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cargo */,
  "is_common" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cargo is commonly used */,
  "stability" TEXT /* Stability of the cargo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cargo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "pubmed_id" TEXT /* PubMed ID associated with the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptide_publications" (
  "peptide_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the peptides table */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the publications table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id", "pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user login (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Researcher, Data Analyst, Administrator) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Research team associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "peptide_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the peptides table */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., Add, Update, Delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "synthesis_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synthesis record */,
  "peptide_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the peptides table */,
  "synthesis_date" TEXT /* Date of synthesis */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for synthesis */,
  "researcher" TEXT /* Researcher who performed the synthesis */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synthesis_records_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modification_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification record */,
  "peptide_id" TEXT /* Foreign key to the peptides table */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date of modification */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for modification */,
  "researcher" TEXT /* Researcher who performed the modification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modification_records_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id")
)
